fileChanges.diff:
diff --git a/src/services/priority-router.ts b/src/services/priority-router.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..b7e534e
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/services/priority-router.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+/**
+ * Priority-based notification router.
+ *
+ * Maps notification priority levels to delivery channels:
+ * - urgent → sms
+ * - normal → email
+ * - low → webhook
+ */
+
+import type { NotificationPriority } from '../events/event-types.js';
+
+const PRIORITY_CHANNEL_MAP: Record<NotificationPriority, string> = {
+  urgent: 'sms',
+  normal: 'email',
+  low: 'webhook',
+};
+
+export class PriorityRouter {
+  /**
+   * Resolve the delivery channel for a given priority level.
+   */
+  resolve(priority: NotificationPriority): string {
+    return PRIORITY_CHANNEL_MAP[priority];
+  }
+}
